entities.name: NATURAL RESOURCE MANAGEMENT
entities.description: Strategies for the sustainable management and conservation of natural resources in agriculture

entities.name: SMALLHOLDER AGRICULTURE
entities.description: Agricultural production systems managed by small-scale farmers

entities.name: MARKET FAILURES
entities.description: Inefficiencies in the market that hinder optimal resource allocation

entities.name: POLICY FAILURES
entities.description: Ineffective government policies that hinder agricultural development

entities.name: INSTITUTIONAL FAILURES
entities.description: Failures in the organizational structures and rules that govern society

entities.name: POVERTY
entities.description: A state of deprivation that limits the ability of farmers to invest

entities.name: LAND DEGRADATION
entities.description: The decline in the quality and productivity of agricultural land

entities.name: MARKET ACCESS
entities.description: The ability of farmers to reach and sell products in markets

entities.name: MARKET LINKAGES
entities.description: The connections between smallholder farmers and market actors

entities.name: ACCESS TO CREDIT
entities.description: The availability of financial loans for agricultural investment

entities.name: BENEFICIAL CONSERVATION
entities.description: Conservation practices that provide economic or ecological benefits

entities.name: LIVELIHOOD
entities.description: The means of securing the necessities of life

entities.name: SUSTAINABILITY-ENHANCING INVESTMENTS
entities.description: Investments aimed at improving long-term environmental and economic sustainability

entities.name: JOINT INNOVATIONS
entities.description: Collaborative efforts to develop and implement new agricultural solutions

entities.name: FARMER EXPERIMENTATION
entities.description: The process of farmers testing and refining new practices on their own land

entities.name: ADAPTATION OF NEW TECHNOLOGIES
entities.description: The modification of technologies to suit local agricultural contexts

entities.name: AGRICULTURAL LANDSCAPES
entities.description: The physical and biological environment where agriculture takes place

entities.name: INSTITUTIONAL MECHANISMS
entities.description: Systems and rules designed to facilitate collective action and governance

entities.name: LOCAL COLLECTIVE ACTION
entities.description: Coordinated efforts by community members to achieve common goals

entities.name: JOINT CONSERVATION INVESTMENTS
entities.description: Shared financial or labor contributions toward conservation goals
